metadata.significance: Uses the morning star to affirm the truth of the Quran

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلطَّارِقِ

translations.en_sahih: By the sky and the night comer -
translations.en_yusufali: By the Sky and the Night-Visitant (therein);-

translations.en_sahih: And what can make you know what is the night comer?
translations.en_yusufali: And what will explain to thee what the Night-Visitant is?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apa jalannya engkau dapat mengetahui apa dia "At-Taariq" itu? -

translations.en_yusufali: (It is) the Star of piercing brightness;-

ayahs.arabic: إِن كُلُّ نَفْسٍ لَّمَّا عَلَيْهَا حَافِظٌ
ayahs.transliteration: In kullu nafsin lamma AAalayha hafithun

translations.en_sahih: There is no soul but that it has over it a protector.
translations.en_yusufali: There is no soul but has a protector over it.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tiada sesuatu diri juapun melainkan ada malaikat yang menjaga (keadaannya serta menyimpan catitan mengenai segala bawaannya).

translations.en_sahih: So let man observe from what he was created.
translations.en_yusufali: Now let man but think from what he is created!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah mengetahui yang demikian), maka hendaklah manusia memikirkan: dari apa ia diciptakan.

translations.en_sahih: He was created from a fluid, ejected,
translations.en_yusufali: He is created from a drop emitted-
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia diciptakan dari air (mani) yang memancut (ke dalam rahim) -

translations.en_sahih: Emerging from between the backbone and the ribs.
translations.en_yusufali: Proceeding from between the backbone and the ribs:
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang keluar dari "tulang sulbi" lelaki dan "tulang dada" perempuan.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, Allah, to return him [to life], is Able.
translations.en_yusufali: Surely (Allah) is able to bring him back (to life)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Allah Maha Kuasa untuk mengembalikannya (hidup semula sesudah mati),

translations.en_sahih: The Day when secrets will be put on trial,
translations.en_yusufali: The Day that (all) things secret will be tested,
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada hari didedahkan segala yang terpendam di hati (dari iktiqad, niat, dan lain-lainnya),

ayahs.arabic: فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن قُوَّةٍ وَلَا نَاصِرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Fama lahu min quwwatin wala nasirin

translations.en_sahih: Then man will have no power or any helper.
translations.en_yusufali: (Man) will have no power, and no helper.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka (pada saat itu) tidak ada bagi manusia sebarang kekuatan (untuk membela diri), dan tidak ada penolong (yang dapat memberikan pertolongan).

translations.en_yusufali: By the Firmament which returns (in its round),
translations.ms_basmeih: Demi langit yang berulang-ulang mencurahkan hujan,

translations.en_sahih: And [by] the earth which cracks open,
translations.en_yusufali: And by the Earth which opens out (for the gushing of springs or the sprouting of vegetation),-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bumi yang merekah mengeluarkan tumbuh-tumbuhan,

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, the Qur'an is a decisive statement,
translations.en_yusufali: Behold this is the Word that distinguishes (Good from Evil):
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya keterangan Al-Quran adalah kata-kata pemutus (yang sebenar),

translations.en_yusufali: It is not a thing for amusement.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bukanlah ia kata-kata yang olok-olok.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, they are planning a plan,
translations.en_yusufali: As for them, they are but plotting a scheme,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya mereka (yang menentangmu, wahai Muhammad) bermati-mati menjalankan rancangan jahat,

translations.en_sahih: But I am planning a plan.
translations.en_yusufali: And I am planning a scheme.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Aku pula tetap bertindak membalas rancangan jahat (mereka, dan menggagalkannya).

translations.en_sahih: So allow time for the disbelievers. Leave them awhile.
translations.en_yusufali: Therefore grant a delay to the Unbelievers: Give respite to them gently (for awhile).
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu janganlah engkau hendakkan segera kebinasaan orang-orang kafir itu, berilah tempoh kepada mereka sedikit masa.
